title: Visionary content kit
description: Describes the shape and realistic constraints of the content a component will render. Used at generation time to make components resilient to real data (long names, diacritics, empty lists, nullable fields) instead of hard-coded 'Jane Doe' fixtures.

locale.description: BCP-47 language tag (sv, de, ja, en). Biases sample generators toward locale-appropriate strings (names, addresses, diacritics).

entities.description: Map of entity name → { sample, constraints }. Entity names should match domain concepts (User, Invoice, Product), not component names.

component_constraints.description: Per-component-type realism. E.g. the median table has 47 rows, the empty-state rate for a list is ~18%.

required_states.description: Rendering states every component must handle. Used by the content-resilience scorer (Task 21.5).

inferred_from.description: Provenance tag: where the kit was auto-inferred from. One of 'ts', 'prisma', 'openapi', 'manual'.

sample.description: At least one realistic instance. More samples = better empty/p95/error state generation at critique time.

relations.description: Relations to other entities. Key = field name on this entity, value = target entity name with cardinality.

p50_length.description: Median string length — biases layout toward typical case.

p95_length.description: Worst-case-still-normal string length — components must not overflow at this.

null_rate.description: Fraction of real rows where this field is null.

target.description: Entity name on the other side of the relation.

sample_size_p95.description: For 'many': realistic item count at p95.
